query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN user_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as system_defaults, SUM(CASE WHEN user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as custom FROM conversion_check_items;
